title: BEM-867 fix queue json
objective:

q = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem867_battle_audit_mailbox.json')
p = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_processed/bem867_battle_audit_mailbox.json')
r = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/bem867_battle_audit_mailbox_result.json')
q.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
if p.exists():
    p.unlink()
if r.exists():
    r.unlink()
objective = 'BEM-867 battle audit. Read governance/tasks/pending/CLAUDE_BATTLE_AUDIT_BEM867.md. Include Findings, Evidence, Recommendation. No issue comments.'
data = {
    'workflow': 'claude.yml',
    'ref': 'main',
    'inputs': {
        'role': 'auditor',
        'provider': 'claude',
        'trace_id': 'bem867_battle_audit_mailbox',
        'cycle_id': 'bem867',
        'task_type': 'battle_audit_mailbox_response',
        'task': objective
    }
}
q.write_text(json.dumps(data, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM867_QUEUE_JSON_FIXED.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-867 queue JSON fixed\nStatus: FIXED\nQueue: governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem867_battle_audit_mailbox.json\nWorkflow: claude.yml\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(q))
